name: be-here-now
description: Ram Dass's Be Here Now — a spiritual classic on presence, meditation, love, and service that guides you from ego-driven seeking to conscious awareness in the here and now
useCase: Helps users cultivate presence through meditation, explore spiritual identity, shift from fear to love, and integrate practice into daily life through service and awareness — based on Ram Dass's transformative journey and practical Cookbook for a Sacred Life.
knownRisks: The book's spiritual framework draws from Hindu and Buddhist traditions — users should engage respectfully with teachings from traditions that may not be their own
Spiritual practice can surface difficult emotions; users are encouraged to go at their own pace
